description: Todo app — full-stack Noether app with RemoteStage backend

stages._comment: todo-api backend — full atom record → { items, new_item }

ui.style: body { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center; min-height: 100vh; padding-top: 64px; } .todo-app { width: 480px; } .todo-title { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 24px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .todo-list { list-style: none; margin: 16px 0; } .todo-item { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid var(--edge); margin-bottom: 8px; border-radius: 4px; background: var(--surface); font-size: 0.95rem; } .todo-empty { padding: 12px 16px; color: var(--dim); font-size: 0.85rem; font-style: italic; } .todo-add { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .todo-input { flex: 1; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid var(--edge); background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.9rem; border-radius: 4px; outline: none; } .todo-input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); } .btn { padding: 10px 18px; border: 1px solid var(--edge); background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); font-size: 0.9rem; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; font-family: inherit; transition: all 0.15s; } .btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); } .btn-add { background: var(--accent); color: var(--bg); border-color: var(--accent); } .btn-add:hover { opacity: 0.85; color: var(--bg); } .btn-del { padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--dim); border-color: transparent; } .btn-del:hover { color: var(--bad); border-color: var(--bad); }
